ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "statefp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "placefp" INTEGER /* Place FIPS code */,
  "placens" INTEGER /* Place NS */,
  "geoid" TEXT /* Unique geographic identifier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the city or town */,
  "namelsad" TEXT /* Name/LSAD of the city or town */,
  "lsad" INTEGER /* LSAD code */,
  "classfp" TEXT /* Class FIPS code */,
  "pcicbsa" TEXT /* Principal city of the CBSA */,
  "pcinecta" TEXT /* Principal city of the NECTA */,
  "mtfcc" TEXT /* MTFCC code */,
  "funcstat" TEXT /* Functional status */,
  "countyfp" TEXT /* County FIPS code */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code(s) associated with the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the city record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_statefp FOREIGN KEY ("statefp") REFERENCES states ("statefp")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "statefp" INTEGER /* State FIPS code */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Name of the state capital */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone(s) of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the state record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town */,
  "aland" INTEGER /* Land area */,
  "awater" INTEGER /* Water area */,
  "intptlat" REAL /* Latitude of the internal point */,
  "intptlon" REAL /* Longitude of the internal point */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Average elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boundaries" (
  "boundary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boundary */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town */,
  "boundary_type" TEXT /* Type of boundary (e.g., incorporated, unincorporated) */,
  "boundary_shape" TEXT /* Geometry of the boundary (e.g., polygon) */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the boundary in square kilometers */,
  "perimeter" INTEGER /* Perimeter of the boundary in kilometers */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the boundary record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boundary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boundaries_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city or town */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or town */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the city or town */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the age distribution */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the gender distribution */,
  "race_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the racial distribution */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the income distribution */,
  "education_distribution" TEXT /* JSON object representing the education distribution */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the demographic record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the city */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the city was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.0, 1.1) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the change record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
